3330980.name: Triple Miracle
3330980.description:
BREAKING THE SEAL

Discover how to open the other two fields! And along the way, if you delay, you may increase your max multiplier in an interesting way...

MANA METERS

You build the left mana meter by popping fallers in the left and center fields. You build the right mana meter by popping fallers in the center and right fields. As the mana meters fill up, your score multiplier increases. Pop either individual mana meter to clear that field, or pop BOTH filled mana meters at once for a massive explosion that clears all three fields... at a cost.

MULTIPLE MODES

You begin the game with only simple mode... but there are more ways to play than just that...

HIGH PRAISE

"this is probably the most compelling solo mode I've played in a color match-n puzzle game, because there's a surprising amount of control you can build by stacking in various ways, and the meter mechanic lets people keep playing if they took some risks; it reminds me of getting extends in shmups from scoring..." - RATTTZ
